description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical beverage can with a bright red background and the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around its body. The can features realistic water droplets printed on the surface, giving it a cold, refreshing appearance. The top is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. On the back, there is detailed product information, including ingredients, nutritional facts, and a barcode, all printed in white text. The can's design includes dynamic white and yellow swooshes, enhancing its visual appeal. The overall look is sleek, modern, and instantly recognizable as a soft drink container.
description: A tall, red Coca-Cola can with a white script logo, metallic top, and detailed product information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo and dynamic swoosh graphics on a red background.
description_view_1: Side view revealing part of the logo, the word 'Coke', and the beginning of the nutritional and product information.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full nutritional facts, ingredients, barcode, and recycling symbols.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the Coca-Cola logo and swoosh graphics, similar to the front but without the main logo's full display.
attribute_brand_logo: Coca-Cola logo, large white cursive script, located on the front and sides of the can, dominant colors are white and red.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate classic cola flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the can in white text.
